As of Day 37, the espionage epic is just a little over Rs. 111 crore away from shattering Allu Arjun’s 'Pushpa 2: The Rule' domestic net record and only Rs. 22 crore away from surpassing 'Baahubali 2: The Conclusion' globally. title: Days before fiancée’s visit, govt executive found dead in Gurgaon flat
description: A 29-year-old executive was found dead in his Gurgaon flat, with police suspecting an overdose of sexual enhancement pills. Colleagues alerted authorities after he failed to respond. The man, originally from Nagpur and recently engaged, was found alone in his locked apartment. A postmortem is pending to confirm the cause of death.

title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warns AI Industry: Stop lying about the disruption
description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning the AI industry to stop downplaying disruption—and start owning it. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is warning the AI industry to stop downplaying disruption—and start owning it. Speaking to the Financial Times, he predicted AI could wipe out 50% of entry-level white-collar jobs within five years. With trust in short supply and early-career workers already feeling the squeeze, Amodei argues the industry's credibility depends on delivering real benefits, not just promising them.

title: After $6.25bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750m
description: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.
